alerts.title: Others Category Surged 1484% This Month
alerts.description: The 'Others' category jumped from ₹45,029 last month to ₹7,13,385 this month — a ₹6,68,355 increase. The top contributor is an unidentified UPI merchant flagged as '❗ You Have Done A UPI Txn. Check Detail' totalling ₹4,69,909 across 47 transactions, which warrants immediate review for potential fraud or miscategorisation.

alerts.title: Suspicious ₹99,999 Bank Account Update Transaction
alerts.description: A single payment of ₹99,999 to 'View: Account Update For Your HDFC Bank' was made this month. This merchant name is a classic phishing/vishing indicator — legitimate bank account updates never involve outgoing payments. Verify this transaction immediately with HDFC Bank.

alerts.title: Food & Dining Spend Up 75% This Month
alerts.description: Food & Dining rose from ₹5,150 last month to ₹9,008 this month. Zomato (₹4,027 across 5 orders) and a single Pizza Express visit (₹2,853) account for ₹6,880 combined — over 76% of the category spend.

alerts.title: Medium Monthly Subscription Likely Unused
alerts.description: A ₹5/month charge from 'Medium Monthly' is active but no reading-related activity appears elsewhere in the data. While negligible in cost, it signals potential for other forgotten micro-subscriptions worth auditing alongside the ₹429 Google Play recurring charge.

tips: Review all 47 transactions under the '❗ You Have Done A UPI Txn. Check Detail' merchant totalling ₹4,69,909 — flag any unrecognised payments to your bank immediately, as this pattern is consistent with bulk UPI fraud or mislabelled bulk transfers.

The ₹99,999 payment to 'View: Account Update For Your HDFC Bank' is highly suspicious. Call HDFC Bank's official helpline (1800-202-6161) today to verify — if fraudulent, file a dispute within 3 days to maximise chargeback chances.

Reduce Zomato ordering frequency: at ₹805/order average across 5 orders this month, cutting to 2 orders/week instead of ~5 could save approximately ₹2,500–₹3,000/month. Supplement with Blinkit grocery orders (₹4,981 this month) for home cooking.

Your Shopping spend of ₹13,830 this month is close to the 3-month average of ₹14,596, but the single Amazon Pay e-commerce transaction of ₹6,004 is large — check if this is a recurring need and consider Amazon Subscribe & Save for repeat items to get 5–15% discounts.

Audit your Google Play subscription of ₹429/month: cross-check active app subscriptions in the Play Store under Payments & Subscriptions and cancel any apps not used in the last 30 days — users typically find 2–3 forgotten app subscriptions saving ₹300–₹900/month.
